para_trans: Government Corrigendum No: PASHAMA-2026 / Q.No.37 / PASU-2
Gokuldas Tejpal Hospital premises, Mantralaya, Mumbai.
Government Decision, Public Health Department No. PASHAMA-2026 / Q.No.37 / PASU-2, Dated
Read the above here in Government Decision Terms and Conditions No. 5.
At the field level, the Deputy Director of Health Services and the District Surgeon concerned will perform the task.
"At the field level, the respective Deputy Director of this work, Health Services and Medical Superintendent, Regional
Psychiatric Hospital, Thane should review from time to time, "reads the notice.
This Government Corrigendum is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
